name: Galatine
description: With massive charged power and the ability to hit up to five foes in a single swing, the Galatine sword is the heavy artillery of Melee Weapons.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: With massive charged power and the ability to hit up to five foes in a single swing, the Galatine sword is the heavy artillery of Melee Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gram using Galatines elemental FX.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed certain finishers (e.g. Galatine back stab) teleporting the victim into strange spots (often out of bounds) after the finisher completes.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes:
including Nekros Prime, Tigris Prime, Galatine Prime, and exclusive Customizations only available through Prime Access!
The new Relics added that contain Nekros Prime, Tigris Prime, and Galatine Prime now contain a mix of the unvaulted items from the above removed Relics.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Galatine, Scindo series, War, Fragor and Magistar damage increased in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: The Scindo series, Gram, Galatine, Magistar, Fragor and Jat Kittag have had their damage and Stance damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed a number of issues with melee items/weapons that result in radial damage. Radial damage values have been significantly lowered on melee ground attacks, especially for the Galatine, Gram, and Jat Kittag. Exact ranges are as follows:Jat Kittag from 10 meters to 6 meters.
Gram and Galatine from 5 meters to 4 meters.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • The Galatine has been enabled for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where Melee weapons (like the Galatine with an attachment) and attachments would obstruct the UI.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed perceived range issues with Galatine, and also fixed misaligned elemental FX.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
It’s Tenno Reinforcement Friday, so get ready to obliterate crowds with the Galatine—a massive two-handed great sword with the strength to carve through multiple opponents at once!
Galatine, a Tenno-forged great sword has been added to the market!
